case_title: CHUGH, ADITYA VS TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,465.00 FILED BY CHUGH, ADITYA AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-29-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-28-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT PENDING. PARTIES AGREE THAT PLAINTIFF RECEIVED $250.00 IN OPEN COURT, AND SHALL, IN ADDITION, RECEIVE A CREDIT OF $237.50 ON HIS OCT.2007 RENT. IF NO APPEARANCES,
SETTLEMENT DEEMED COMPLETE AND COURT WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP.
